About Mirrorbit AI

Building intelligence
that matters.

We are a team of engineers, designers, and AI researchers on a mission to make sophisticated artificial intelligence accessible, reliable, and beautiful.

Mission

Precision tools for a digital-first world.

At Mirrorbit AI, we believe that the best AI products are invisible — they feel natural, instant, and inevitable. Our work spans computer vision, large language models, and real-time inference systems.

Founded with the conviction that software should make life measurably better, we ship products used by hundreds of thousands of people every day.

2M+

Meals analyzed by SlayCal

500+

Restaurants on Restaurant Managment System

99.9%

Platform uptime SLA

40+

Countries reached

Values

What we stand for.

precision_manufacturing

Precision

Every pixel, every inference, every API response — we hold ourselves to a standard that most teams consider obsessive.

favorite

Human-Centered

Technology exists to serve people. We design from the user backward, always asking what makes life genuinely better.

public

Open

We believe in transparency — in our models, our pricing, and our roadmaps. Our users are partners, not captives.

Want to work together?

We're always looking for exceptional people and interesting problems.
